basicDetails.schemeName: Sharodotsav Pandit Nandan Mehta: Plan for Conducting Classical Music Competition and Ceremony

nodalDepartmentName.label: Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme "Sharodotsav Pandit Nandan Mehta: Plan for Conducting Classical Music Competition and Ceremony" aims to promote classical music and percussion by organizing a state-level competition and award ceremony on the death anniversary of Pt. Nandan Mehta, through the provision of cash prizes.

children.text: The scheme "Sharodotsav Pandit Nandan Mehta: Plan for Conducting Classical Music Competition and Ceremony" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to preserve and promote the rich heritage of classical music and percussion through a state-level competitive platform dedicated to the memory of the legendary percussionist Pt. Nandan Mehta. A three-day classical music and percussion competition is held every year on February 26, the death anniversary of Pt. Mehta, where outstanding artists are recognized and awarded monetary prizes for their exceptional performances. The scheme is implemented by the Gujarat State Sangeet Natak Academy.
The interested applicant should download the prescribed format of the application form.
In the application form, provide all the mandatory details, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the supporting documents to the Sangeet Natak Academy.
Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted.
Block No-14, 2nd Floor, Dr. Jivaraj Maheta Bhavan,

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The interested applicant should download the prescribed format of the application form. **Step 2:** In the application form, provide all the mandatory details, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required). **Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the supporting documents to the Sangeet Natak Academy. **Step 4:** Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted. > **Contact Us:** Gujarat State Sangeet Natak Academy Block No-14, 2nd Floor, Dr. Jivaraj Maheta Bhavan, Sector 10-A, Gandhinagar - 382010. 079 - 232 54552, 232 51693

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat. - The applicant should be an individual participating in the classical music or percussion category.

children.text: The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat.
The applicant should be an individual participating in the classical music or percussion category.
